citations.finding: 47 failed SSH authentication attempts within 3 minutes targeting port 22 on bastion-01. Login usernames include root, admin, ubuntu — consistent with automated dictionary brute-force (T1110.001). Severity: medium.
No extractable IP address in alert text; source IP redacted in log format. Threat intelligence lookups skipped.
